summary: ISS-1670 duplicates ISS-1615. The 'Robustness check (altitude convention)' paragraph already in §4.2.7a (added by EXP-268 P2, integrated commit d06d75d on 2026-04-27T22:05:10Z) addresses the curmudgeon's recommended numbers: physical h_Sun ≤ 4,200 km, scaled h_Moon ≈ 1,860 km, R_p drops to ~31 km, band narrows to ~62 km wide, kill 'strengthens' under physical reading. ISS-1615 is closed 'fixed' at 2026-04-27T21:19:43Z. No further patch needed.
closure_reason: Duplicate of closed ISS-1615 (status='fixed', fixed_by=expansion-integration via EXP-268, fixed_at 2026-04-27T21:19:43.948Z). Both issues derive from the same curmudgeon review (monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/EXP-260-proposal.c1.json) and the same hole; the underlying patches are present in §4.2.7a HEAD (verified by text inspection, see EXP-274 verification block).
hole_label: EXP-260 §4.2.7a c1 H4 — observed-vs-physical altitude pre-empt
